## Guardrails

Confirm all applicable items:

- [ ] No `data/` or `results/` files are committed.
- [ ] No raw market data, normalized market CSV, generated candidate CSV, generated result CSV, or backtest output is committed.
- [ ] No raw transcript, subtitle full text, raw TXT/SRT/VTT caption file, caption URL, raw DownSub output, downloaded video, downloaded audio, or ASR output is committed.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, or secrets are committed.
- [ ] No market-data API, broker API, order-placement, auto-trading, or live-trading behavior is added.
- [ ] No Strategy C work is added.
- [ ] No unauthorized strategy parameter optimization is added.
- [ ] No profitability claim or guarantee is made.
- [ ] Strategy A/B verification work and YouTube channel-wide corpus work are not mixed unless this PR explicitly documents the approved design decision.
